---
lightbox: true
execute:
  freeze: auto
  echo: false
---

This site hosts a collection of [my](https://nrennie.rbind.io/) miscellaneous data visualisation projects. This home page includes all static charts, but you can also explore different interactive visualisations via the *Interactive projects* tab.

## Static charts

### History of the Akimel O’odham

![](history-akimel-oodham/images/history.png){width="100%"}


### Lemur Family Tree

![](lemur-family-tree/images/lemur-family-tree.png){width="100%"}


### London Marathon

![](london-marathon/images/london-marathon.jpg){width="100%"}


### Nobel Prize Laureates

![](nobel-prize-laureates/images/nobel_light_mode.png){width="100%"}


### Reading Shelf

![](reading-shelf/images/reading-shelf.png){width="100%"}

### Reddit's *al dente* pasta

![](reddit-al-dente-pasta/images/pasta.png){width="100%"}

### Sea Surface Temperatures

Submitted for the European Space Agency Little Pictures competition.

![](ESA-little-pictures/esa-little-pictures.png){width="100%"}

### StackOverflow Survey

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](stackoverflow-survey/so_age.png){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](stackoverflow-survey/so_coding.png){width="100%"}
:::

:::

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](stackoverflow-survey/so_education.png){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](stackoverflow-survey/so_salary.png){width="100%"}
:::

:::

### TidyTuesday Wrapped

Summary of my most used R functions and packages in [TidyTuesday visualisations](https://github.com/nrennie/tidytuesday), inspired by Spotify Wrapped.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](tidytuesday-wrapped/images/tidytuesday-wrapped-2023.png){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](tidytuesday-wrapped/images/tidytuesday-wrapped-2022.png){width="100%"}
:::

:::


### Western States 100

![](western-states-100/western-states-100.jpg){width="100%"}

### xkcd Colors

![](xkcd-colors/images/xkcd-colors.png){width="100%"}


## Static maps

### Circography

![](circography/images/circography.png){width="100%"}

### Forest of Bowland

![](forest-of-bowland/images/forest-of-bowland.png){width="100%"}


### General Health

Two maps using Census 2021 data, one made with R and one made with Python.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

![](general-health/images/general-health-2021-census-a.png){width="100%"}

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

![](general-health/images/general-health-2021-census-b.png){width="100%"}

:::

:::

### John Snow Cholera Map

![](john-snow-cholera-map/images/john-snow-cholera-map-nrennie.png){width="100%"}

### Photomap of Edinburgh

![](photo-map-edinburgh/images/map.png){width="100%"}


### Regions in Boxes

![](regions-in-boxes/images/scotland.png){width="100%"}


### Typography Cartography

![](typography-cartography/images/typography-cartography.png){width="100%"}


## Data art

### Bob Ross Paintings

Heatmap treemap of most common colours used in Bob Ross paintings.

![](bob-ross-paintings/images/bob-ross-paintings.png){width="100%"}


### Heatmap Blanket

Heatmap of HADCET data designed in R, then crocheted with yarn.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](heatmap-blanket/images/heatmap-blanket-pattern.png){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
![](heatmap-blanket/images/heatmap-blanket.jpg){width="100%"}
:::

:::


### Poetry

![](poetry/images/still-i-rise-v1.png){width="100%"}


### Shakespeare's Sonnets

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](shakespeares-sonnets/images/sonnetCLIII.png){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](shakespeares-sonnets/images/sonnetCXLIX.png){width="100%"}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
![](shakespeares-sonnets/images/sonnetXVIII.png){width="100%"}
:::

:::


## Interactive visualisations

### Income Inequality

Explore the [interactive version](/income-inequality/).

![](income-inequality/featured.png){width="100%"}


### Local Council Elections

Explore the [interactive version](/local-council-elections/).

![](local-council-elections/featured.png){width="100%"}


### Periodic Table

Explore the [interactive version](/periodic-table/).

![](periodic-table/featured.png){width="100%"}

::: {.callout-tip}

The source code for all charts can be found on [GitHub](https://github.com/nrennie/data-viz-projects).

:::
